items.front: 9-6-1: Unmanned free balloon climb and descent rates
items.back: ASCENT: 400 ft/min average (balloon + payload). DESCENT: payload by parachute at minimum 1,000 ft/min. Operator must advise ATC 1 hour before descent (14 CFR 101.39).

items.front: 9-6-1: Conditions for providing separation from unmanned free balloons
items.back: 1) WITH pilot concurrence, AND 2) when balloon info is sufficiently reliable. Do NOT use vertical separation without accurate balloon altitude.

items.front: 9-6-1: Three elements of unmanned free balloon traffic advisory
items.back: 1) Known or estimated position. 2) Direction of movement. 3) Altitude as 'unknown' or 'reported.' Provided to all affected aircraft on initial contact.

items.front: 9-6-1: Tracking alternatives when radar flight following not possible
items.back: 1) Chase plane communications. 2) Telephone contact with operator. 3) Pilot reports. 4) Ground observation reports.

items.front: 9-6-1: Seven items to forward when transferring balloon flight following
items.back: 1) ID/type. 2) Last position/altitude. 3) Direction/speed. 4) ETA over boundary. 5) Other pertinent info. 6) Radar point-out if in contact. 7) Tracking location name/phone.
UNMANNED FREE BALLOON OVER/ESTIMATED OVER (location), MOVING (direction). LAST REPORTED ALTITUDE AT (altitude) or ALTITUDE UNKNOWN.

items.front: 9-6-2: Two conditions that make a balloon derelict
items.back: 1) Moored balloon slips mooring and becomes hazard to air navigation. 2) Unmanned free balloon flight cannot be terminated as planned.

items.front: 9-6-2: Derelict moored vs. derelict unmanned free balloon — controller actions
items.back: MOORED: issue traffic advisories only. UNMANNED FREE: flight follow + provide separation to the extent possible. Different responses per 9-6-2a/b.
10-minute intervals until no longer a factor. NOT 3 minutes (that is for fuel dumping, 9-4-5). Forward position info to supervisor for dissemination.
ADVISORY TO ALL AIRCRAFT. DERELICT BALLOON REPORTED/ESTIMATED/RADAR REPORTED IN THE VICINITY OF/OVER (location). LAST REPORTED ALTITUDE/FL AT (alt/FL) or ALTITUDE/FL UNKNOWN.

items.front: 9-6-2: Derelict balloon — where to forward position info
items.back: Forward pilot-report or radar-derived position info to your SUPERVISOR for further dissemination. Transfer flight following per 9-6-1e.
